query:
-- Apollo credit usage last 14 days
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as day,
  COUNT(*) as calls,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as credits_used,
  action
FROM apolloCreditLog
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt), action
ORDER BY day DESC;

-- Apollo credit usage last 14 days
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as day,
  COUNT(*) as calls,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as credits_used,
  action
FROM apolloCreditLog
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt), action
ORDER BY day DESC;
